answers.question: Why should we hire you?
answers.answer: I am a very hardworking student. I have done many projects in Java. Please give me a chance. I am very much interested in this internship.

answers.question: Why should we hire you?
answers.answer: In today's rapidly evolving technological landscape, my diverse skill set and passion for innovation make me a prime candidate. I'm committed to leveraging my expertise to drive meaningful results.

answers.question: Why should we hire you?
answers.answer: Maine bohot React kaam kiya hai. I built a full-stack app using Node and Express. My GitHub has all the code. I can join immediately.
